visual_summary: ComponentCard is a card UI component from the hyperui corpus. It provides reusable card behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: ComponentCard
Description: ComponentCard is a card UI component from the hyperui corpus. It provides reusable card behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: rounded, shadow, utility-styled
Interactions: animated, hover
Tags: card, hyperui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/ComponentCard.astro
---
import type { CollectionEntry } from 'astro:content'

import { ArrowRight } from '@lucide/astro'

interface Props {
  component:
    | CollectionEntry<'application'>['data']
    | CollectionEntry<'marketing'>['data']
    | CollectionEntry<'neobrutalism'>['data']
}

const { component } = Astro.props

const { category, components, slug, title, updated } = component

const componentCount = components.length + components.filter(({ dark }) => !!dark).length
